problem id: 3564baf1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) OR SHR(7)

examples:
  10011111 -> 11111101
  10011001 -> 11001101
  00100010 -> 00010001
  11011001 -> 11001111
  00111001 -> 11001001
  11001010 -> 01010111
  11000101 -> 00101111
  11101110 -> 01110111
  01101111 -> 01111011
  01100010 -> 00010011

query: 10110101
predicted answer: 10101101
